title: Spicy Gooey Brie Quesadilla
description: A brunch-mood American dish featuring brie in a spicy gooey quesadilla, perfect for egg-free-friendly recipes and slow-cook methods.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp of mayonnaise
ingredients.notes: Use vegan mayo for non-dairy option.

ingredients.name: 1 tbsp of finely chopped red pepper flakes
Vegetable oil or vegan butter for frying

instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Slice the brie into thin rounds. If using, spread mayonnaise on one side of each tortilla and place a slice of brie on top of it.
Top with cheddar cheese slices, followed by a sprinkle of red pepper flakes.
Fold the other half of the tortilla over to form a quesadilla. Cook for about 1-2 minutes until the bottom is golden brown.
Flip and cook the other side for another 1-2 minutes or until it's also golden brown.
Serve warm with additional brie, mayonnaise, and red pepper flakes as desired.
